============================================================
LOONIX TUNES Win64 v2 - READ ME / BACA SAYA
============================================================

[ ENGLISH ]

1. TO INSTALL (Recommended):
   Double-click 'LoonixTunesWin64v2.exe' in this folder. 
   This will install the app to your system and create a shortcut.

2. PORTABLE VERSION (No Installation):
   Right-click 'BuildPortable.ps1' and select "Run with PowerShell".
   A new folder 'LoonixTunesWin64v2-Portable' will be created with all files.

3. BUILD FROM SOURCE (For Developers):
   To build from the latest source code:
   - Clone the repository: git clone https://github.com/citzeye/loonix-tunes-windows
   - Install Rust & Cargo.
   - Run: cargo build --release

------------------------------------------------------------

[ BAHASA INDONESIA ]

1. CARA INSTALL (Direkomendasikan):
   Klik dua kali 'LoonixTunesWin64v2.exe' di folder ini.
   Ini akan menginstal aplikasi ke sistem dan membuat shortcut.

2. VERSI PORTABLE (Tanpa Install):
   Klik kanan 'BuildPortable.ps1' dan pilih "Run with PowerShell".
   Folder baru 'LoonixTunesWin64v2-Portable' akan dibuat berisi semua file aplikasi.

3. BUILD DARI SOURCE (Untuk Developer):
   Jika ingin build sendiri dari resource terbaru:
   - Tarik repo: git clone https://github.com/your-repo/loonix-tunes
   - Pastikan sudah install Rust & Cargo.
   - Jalankan: cargo build --release

============================================================
